text:
is a female Japanese voice actress born in Hokkaidō and raised in Fukushima. Formerly affiliated for Haikyo, she is now affiliated with Atomic Monkey. She voices Maya Ibuki.

A selection of other characters voiced by Miki Nagasawa

Black Lagoon: The Second Barrage as Jane

Claymore as Helen

Cowboy Bebop as Judy

Death Note as Wedy

Great Teacher Onizuka as Hitomi Kizaki (ep 21-22)

Princess Nine as Ryou Hayakawa

Vampire Princess Miyu as Miyu
